issues.sample: I have had trouble with both my right and left taillight blinkers failing at various times. In the first instance, I took the car into BMW of Seattle to get a new bulb, but this did not fix the problem. After talking with the parts department, the man informed me that it might be

2018 BMW X2.  THE CAR HAS THE PARKING ASSIST FUNCTION, WHICH IS SUPPOSED TO PARALLEL PARK THE CAR.  AT DELIVERY, I WAS TOLD HOW TO USE THE SYSTEM, THE SYSTEM FINDS A SPACE, STEERS AND BRAKES.  THE VIDEO ON THE DEALERSHIP WEBSITE SAYS IT BRAKES FOR YOU.    HTTPS://WWW.PASSPORTBMW.

2018 BMW X2.  THE CAR HAS THE PARKING ASSIST FUNCTION, WHICH IS SUPPOSED TO PARALLEL PARK THE CAR.  AT DELIVERY, I WAS TOLD HOW TO USE THE SYSTEM, THE SYSTEM FINDS A SPACE, STEERS AND BRAKES.  THE VIDEO ON THE DEALERSHIP WEBSITE SAYS IT BRAKES FOR YOU.    HTTPS://WWW.PASSPORTBMW.

While driving a drivetrain warning ️ was detected and code was displayed on the I drive, along with a CEL.  The vehicle is in limp mode so I was unable to accelerate past 35-40 mph. Took the car into the dealership and was informed that my waste gate actuator failed @59,388 miles

narrative.headline: What 2018 Bmw X2 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 14 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Exterior Lighting (36% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
